sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Diagonal Hopping Movement
special_mechanics.description: Q*bert moves by hopping diagonally from cube to cube on an isometric pyramid. Movement is controlled via a four-way joystick mounted diagonally.

special_mechanics.name: Flying Disc Teleport
special_mechanics.description: Multicolored floating discs on either side of the pyramid serve as escape points. When Q*bert jumps on a disc, it transports him instantly to the top of the pyramid.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No precise movement physics documentation exists for the NES port. Game is primarily puzzle-action with emphasis on enemy avoidance and color-changing mechanics rather than fine-tuned movement physics. Movement is grid-based diagonal hopping with no variable jump height or momentum mechanics documented.
